slice: 10 PR4 — draw (Draw tab) on the PM engine
reference: Word for Windows 16.0 (COM oracle scripts/oracle/word-oracle-win.ps1, PID-safe, foreground/STA, unsandboxed)
probes: scripts/oracle-probe-slice10-draw-ink.js (Task-1 early gate: single stroke, MODE inline|anchor)
constructs: ink stroke = real DrawingML freeform (a:custGeom/a:pathLst, moveTo+quadBezTo) + a:ln pen stroke, anchored wp:anchor (floats where drawn)
Drawing Canvas = real bounded a:prstGeom rect shape + a:ln border

earlyGate_task1.purpose: Prove the a:custGeom/wp:anchor blob opens in Word BEFORE building the overlay/flip (the PR3 cover-id lesson — only the COM oracle catches schema-fatal constructs).
earlyGate_task1.inline: EXIT=0 (clean) — proves the a:custGeom + a:ln blob is valid
earlyGate_task1.anchor: EXIT=0 (clean) — Word preserves a:custGeom/a:pathLst/wp:posOffset/srgbClr on resave
earlyGate_task1.verdict: anchor opens clean → kept the best-fidelity default INK_MODE='anchor' (ink floats where drawn)

legA.verb: roundtrip clone.docx (3 strokes: black pen, red pen, yellow highlighter + a canvas frame) -> Word resave
legA.result: EXIT=0 — Word opened WITHOUT repair and resaved (16975 bytes).

legB.result: openDocx=true, importBlanked=false — clone imports Word's own serialization HEALTHY.
legB.overlayRendered: 3 (the PM ink overlay rendered all 3 imported strokes from the importer's customGeometry.paths — K3 render-from-paths validated on Word's bytes)

verdict: BOTH LEGS PASS. Freehand ink + the canvas frame export real Word-native DrawingML (a:custGeom freeform + prstGeom rect) that opens without repair, survives Word's resave (incl. anchored positioning + the highlighter alpha), and re-imports into the clone healthy + renders. A strict upgrade over the legacy ink (which never exported to .docx).
gates: PM 317/317, legacy 257/257 byte-identical, smoke 9/9 x2, roundtrip 27/0, docx 17/0.
manualVerify: Live pointer-capture drawing (pointerdown/move/up) is ported from the proven legacy geometry but is not exercisable headlessly; the persist->render path (Task-4 probe) and the import->render path (Leg B) ARE validated programmatically. Recommend a manual draw in `npm start` to confirm the live UX + the page-position mapping (R3).
